description: An impressionistic view of a Venetian canal seen from beneath the Rialto Bridge. The massive stone arch of the bridge dominates the upper portion, with sculptural reliefs and a commemorative plaque visible on its underside. Through the arch, the sunlit canal extends into the distance with gondolas and figures. At right, a man stands on a laden cargo boat. The water reflects warm golden light, and the overall atmosphere is one of shimmering, humid luminosity characteristic of Venice.
